subcodes.first_line: O thou sign of Divine grace! In truth thou didst dispatch numerous letters, but few arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آیت فضل الهی فی الحقیقه نامه های بسیار ارسال نمودید ولی کم رسید و از اطراف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
